heading: Omitted
label: 61 to 64 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 61 to 64, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 61, acts , ; , ; , , authorized appointment of a Governor for Territory, and detailed his duties.June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 231 Stat. 321May 29, 1928, ch. 901, § 1(109)45 Stat. 994July 25, 1947, ch. 332, § 161 Stat. 459Section 62, acts , ; , ; , ; , ; , , related to appointment of Governor and his compensation.
